mapper.sql: select u.user_id, u.tenant_id, u.user_balance, u.user_grade, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.user_type, u.email, u.avatar, u.wx_avatar, u.phonenumber, u.password, u.user_plan, u.sex, u.status, u.del_flag, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.create_by, u.create_time, u.remark, u.krole_group_type, u.krole_group_ids, d.dept_id, d.parent_id, d.ancestors, d.dept_name, d.order_num, d.status as dept_status, r.role_id, r.role_name, r.role_key, r.role_sort, r.data_scope, r.status as role_status, sp.post_name from sys_user u left join sys_post sp on sp.post_id = u.primary_post_id left join sys_dept d on sp.dept_id = d.dept_id left join sys_user_role sur on u.user_id = sur.user_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = sur.role_id
mapper.select: where u.del_flag = '0' and u.user_name = #{userName} and u.tenant_id = #{tenantId}

select distinct u.user_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.sex, u.phonenumber, u.status, u.create_time, sp.post_name, sp.post_id as primaryPostId, sd.dept_id, sd.dept_name from sys_user u left join sys_post sp on sp.post_id = u.primary_post_id left join sys_dept sd on sd.dept_id = sp.dept_id ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}

select u.*, sp.post_name, sd.dept_name, sd.dept_id from sys_user u left join sys_post sp on u.primary_post_id = sp.post_id left join sys_dept sd on sd.dept_id = sp.dept_id where u.user_name = #{username} and u.status = '0' and u.del_flag = '0'
select * from sys_role sr join sys_user_role sur on sur.role_id = sr.role_id join sys_user su on su.user_id = sur.user_id where sr.tenant_id= #{tenantId} and sr.role_key = #{roleKey}
select * from sys_dept sd join sys_user su on su.dept_id = sd.dept_id where sd.tenant_id= #{tenantId} and sd.dept_id = #{deptId}
select su.user_id from sys_dept sd join sys_user su on su.dept_id = sd.dept_id where sd.dept_id = #{deptId} and su.del_flag = 0

select u.*, sd.dept_name, sp.post_name, sr.role_name from sys_user u left join sys_post sp on sp.post_id = u .primary_post_id left join sys_dept sd on sd.dept_id = sp.dept_id left join sys_user_role sur on sur.user_id = u.user_id left join sys_role sr on sr.role_id = sur.role_id ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}

select distinct u.user_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.sex, u.phonenumber, u.status, u.create_time, u.login_date, u.avatar, sp.post_name, sp.post_id as primaryPostId, sd.dept_id, sd.dept_name from sys_user u left join sys_post sp on sp.post_id = u.primary_post_id left join sys_dept sd on sd.dept_id = sp.dept_id where u.user_id = #{userId}
